annexure_reference: Annexure B: Rynette to Bantjes — 'Done on your request, for which I have no answer' (6 Jun 2025)
pipeline: Neon DB → Graph API body/attachment sync → EML generation → Transport header fetch

envelope.subject: RE: SARS query re the two big inter company invoices at the end of February 2025

body.preview:
Hi Danie

Yes, that is correct.  I do respond to all the Vat related queries, if I receive them or I can see them on my portal.  However, I have not received this notification via email, and neither is it filed on my Efiling portal.  Are you saying that

chain_of_custody.extraction_method: Microsoft Graph API v1.0 (client credentials flow)
chain_of_custody.verification: SPF/DKIM/DMARC authentication via internet message headers
chain_of_custody.integrity: SHA-256 hash of generated EML file
